---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for the open library
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What problem does this solve?**
The use case or pain point motivating the request.

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to happen.

**Alternatives considered**
Other approaches you thought about.

**Scope note**
This repo is the open baseline. Advanced GMS features live in the separately
licensed `knowlytix` backend — for those, see https://knowlytix.ai/.

**Additional context**
Anything else that helps.
